sex.Description: sex of the participant as reported by the participant

race.Description: race of the participant as reported by the participant

Levels.Asian: Asian, Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander

ethnicity.Description: ethnicity of the participant as reported by the participant

handedness.Description: handedness of the participant as reported by the participant

height.Description: height of the participant (recorded as inches at time of scan session, reported in centimeters)

weight.Description: weight of the participant (recorded as pounds at time of scan session, reported in kilograms
